preconditions.requiredConsent: Explicit user consent with scope, purpose, and cancellation confirmation required before any real scan.
preconditions.requiredPathJailValidation: Path jail must be defined and validated; all scan targets must be within the jail boundary.
preconditions.requiredScanScopePreview: A preview of the scan scope (file count estimate, size estimate, excluded patterns) must be shown to the user before any real scan begins.
preconditions.requiredRedactionPolicy: All text fields derived from filesystem content must pass redaction before inclusion in any evidence, timeline, or export artifact.
preconditions.requiredSecretDetectionPolicy: Secret/credential detection must run before any path, filename, or content is included in context or refs.
preconditions.requiredExclusionPolicy: Exclusion patterns for secrets, binaries, node_modules, .git, vendor, credentials, and symlinks must be defined and applied.
preconditions.requiredNoMutationGuarantee: Scan must be structurally read-only; no filesystem mutation, no git commits, no file writes permitted.
preconditions.requiredNoCloudDefault: No cloud upload by default; cloud sync requires separate explicit policy and consent.
preconditions.requiredNoLlmBeforeContextApproval: No LLM context building, prompt generation, or provider call until context approval policy is defined and approved.
preconditions.requiredAuditBeforeRealScan: A dedicated audit of the scan implementation must be completed before any real scan is executed.
